Text.Page:
You're doing great, . Word of your deeds is starting to spread.

But let's see if we can't speed things up—literally.

Head out to Corsairs' Stronghold, win a few battles, and come back here, and I'll make you faster than ever.
Congratulations, <PCNAME>! Here you go: This should boost your speed, and get you into the history books faster than ever!
